Title: Cross-Device Flow
Description: View end-to-end flows across sender and receiver devices

Example.Description: Find all events for a cross-device flow using origin_flow_id

ExampleDescriptions: Track clipboard content from sender to receiver
Identify where delays occur in cross-device sync

FieldMapping.flow_id: Current device's flow_id for this clipboard operation
FieldMapping.origin_flow_id: Original sender's flow_id (preserved through the sync pipeline)
FieldMapping.origin_device_id: Original device that captured the clipboard content
